<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs small — one logical change per PR.
Read CONTRIBUTING.md if this is your first PR.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick whichever applies. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-visible capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behaviour difference
- [ ] `test` — adds or fixes tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI
- [ ] `threshold` — scoring threshold tuning (link calibration data)

## Verification

<!--
How did you verify this works?
For ingester changes, did you run `make test`?
For dashboard changes, did you reload Grafana and click through the dashboard?
For threshold changes, did you back-test against historical mornings?
-->

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] Dashboard renders without panel errors (if dashboard changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Linked issue, if applicable: closes #

## Screenshots / output

<!-- Optional. Particularly helpful for dashboard changes. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, or known follow-ups. -->
